title: Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise

'''''Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] junior novel written by [[Jude Watson]]. It is the fourth novel in the series [[Star Wars: Jedi Quest (novel series)|''Star Wars: Jedi Quest'']], and it was first published in [[November]] [[2002]], by [[Scholastic]]. An [[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise (abridged audiobook)|audiobook]] version was also published.

''The Master of Disguise'' is set in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], and it follows [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] as they uncover a plot by [[Granta Omega]].

==Publisher's summary==
''How do you defeat an enemy whose riches buy unlimited power?''

''How do you defeat an enemy who is a master of disguise?''

''How do you defeat an enemy you cannot find?''

''Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi are facing a very real threat from a very elusive adversary, who is as cunning as he is evil. He will stop at nothing to draw others to the dark side and undermine the Republic. If the Jedi do not stop him, it will mean danger for the whole galaxy''.

==Plot summary==
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] once again run afoul of [[Granta Omega]]. Their enigmatic enemy hires [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] on [[Haariden]] to attack a team of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] tasked with protecting a [[Science/Legends|scientific]] expedition on the [[Groundquake/Legends|seismically]] active [[Planet/Legends|world]]. Though the Jedi survive, Anakin’s impulsiveness results in fellow [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Darra Thel-Tanis]] being inadvertently injured in the attack. Back on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Omega poses as a scientist and lures Anakin into a trap, but Obi-Wan rescues his apprentice. The two learn that Omega, though not [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], is a [[Sith cultist/Legends|cultist]] who wishes to attract the attention of the unseen [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] by moving against the Jedi. Omega attempts to exploit a [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] eruption on Haariden to reap its [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] wealth in a bid to corner the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] market. The Jedi chase Omega to Haariden, but he once again escapes.

==Continuity==
A jump in time advanced [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin]] to sixteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of age, as revealed in [[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear|book five]] of the [[Star Wars: Jedi Quest|series]].<ref name="Essential Reader's Companion" />
